questions.context_sentence: We celebrate our own birthdays.
questions.hint: cel (策) + e + brate (波瑞特) -> 策划庆祝活动。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “庆祝；庆贺”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: Birthday Celebrations
questions.hint: celebrate的动作名词形式，表示庆祝活动。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'celebration' mean in Chinese?

questions.meaning: 惊奇；惊讶 v. 使感到意外
questions.context_sentence: How about a surprise party for them?
questions.hint: sur (在……之上) + prise (抓) -> 突然被抓住，感到十分惊讶。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: How about a ____ party for them?
questions.cn: 给他们办一个惊喜派对怎么样？

questions.context_sentence: How about a surprise party for them?
questions.hint: surprise (令人惊喜的) + party (聚会) -> 惊喜派对。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “惊喜派对”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: and then I make a wish and blow out the candles.
questions.hint: make (做一个) + a + wish (心愿) -> 许愿。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____ and blow out the candles. (提示: 许愿)
questions.cn: 许个愿，然后把蜡烛吹灭。

questions.context_sentence: and then I make a wish and blow out the candles.
questions.hint: b (爸) + low (低) -> 爸爸低下头吹气球。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I make a wish and ____ out the candles. (提示: 吹)
questions.cn: 我许个愿，然后把蜡烛吹灭。

questions.context_sentence: and then I make a wish and blow out the candles.
questions.hint: blow (吹) + out (向外) -> 把火吹向外面，就是吹灭。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “吹灭”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: What else would you like to buy for a birthday party?
questions.hint: ball (球) + oon (气球形状) -> 充气像球一样的东西是气球。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'balloon'?

questions.meaning: adj. & pron. 自己的；本人的
questions.context_sentence: We celebrate our own birthdays.
questions.hint: o + w + n -> 我自己完全拥有自己。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We always celebrate our ____ birthdays.
questions.cn: 我们总是庆祝我们自己的生日。

questions.context_sentence: I'd like to watch it grow with me.
questions.hint: g + row (排) -> 绿苗排成排成长起来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I'd like to watch it ____ with me. (提示: 成长)
questions.cn: 我想看着它和我一起成长。

questions.context_sentence: Teng Fei, how about some yogurt?
questions.hint: yo (哟) + gurt (果特) -> 优格，就是酸奶。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'yogurt' mean in Chinese?

questions.meaning: n. 总数；合计 adj. 总的；全体的
questions.context_sentence: What's the total?
questions.hint: to (头) + tal (特) -> 头等重要的事情是统计总数。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What's the ____ price of all these things?
questions.cn: 所有这些东西的总价是多少？

questions.context_sentence: My mother always makes my favourite chocolate cake.
questions.hint: choc (巧克) + o + late (力) -> 音译：巧克力。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “巧克力”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: What else would you like to buy for a birthday party?
questions.hint: piz (比) + za (萨) -> 音译：比萨饼。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “比萨饼”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: How much is this birthday cake?
questions.hint: birthday (生日) + cake (蛋糕) -> 生日蛋糕。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “生日蛋糕”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: Read the conversation and complete the table.
questions.hint: p (怕) + rice (大米) -> 害怕大米的价格上涨。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'price'?

questions.context_sentence: We have a sale today.
questions.hint: s (死) + ale (麦芽酒) -> 死皮赖脸降价出售麦芽酒。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'sale'?

questions.context_sentence: We have a sale today.
questions.hint: have (有) + a + sale (售卖活动) -> 进行打折促销。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The supermarket is going to ____ a sale this weekend. (提示: 降价出售)
questions.cn: 这家超市这周末要打折促销。

questions.context_sentence: Six yuan a kilo.
questions.hint: kilogram的简称，音译：千克、公斤。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: How many ____ of apples do you want? (提示: 千克)

questions.meaning: n. 名单；清单 v. 列表；列清单
questions.context_sentence: Put the things in the box into different groups on the shopping list.
questions.hint: l (老) + ist (一堆人) -> 老师的清单上有一堆人的名字。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Write down what we need to buy on the shopping ____.
questions.cn: 把我们需要买的东西写在购物清单上。

questions.meaning: v. 做记号；纪念；打分 n. 记号
questions.context_sentence: It marks the birthday of Florence Nightingale...
questions.hint: m (马) + ark (方舟) -> 在马身上的方舟上做记号。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: This special day ____ the founding of our school.
questions.cn: 这个特别的日子纪念我们学校的创立。

questions.context_sentence: When is China's National Day?
questions.hint: national (国家的) + Day (日子) -> 国家最重大的节日，即国庆节。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “国庆节”对应的英文短语是？

questions.meaning: 中国共产党建党纪念日
questions.context_sentence: Talk about special days.
questions.hint: CPC (中国共产党) + Founding (创建) + Day (日子)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “中国共产党建党纪念日”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 中国共产党建党纪念日

questions.meaning: 中国人民解放军建军节
questions.context_sentence: Talk about special days.
questions.hint: PLA (中国人民解放军) + Day (日子) -> 八一建军节。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “中国人民解放军建军节”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 中国人民解放军建军节

questions.context_sentence: When is China's National Day?
questions.hint: nation (国家) + al (形容词后缀) -> 国家的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'national' mean in Chinese?

questions.context_sentence: And we celebrate International Nurses Day on 12th May.
questions.hint: inter (在……之间) + national (国家的) -> 国家之间的，就是国际的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'international' mean in Chinese?

questions.context_sentence: Talk about special days.
questions.hint: f (爸) + o + u + n + d -> 爸爸辛辛苦苦创立了公司。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: They want to ____ a new club for students. (提示: 创立)
questions.cn: 他们想为学生创立一个新的俱乐部。

questions.context_sentence: as English Language Day.
questions.hint: lan (懒) + guage (规矩) -> 懒人说话也有规矩，就形成了语言。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'language'?

questions.context_sentence: Celebrating my birthday: When, What to prepare, Where to go, With whom, What to do, How I feel.
questions.hint: who的宾格形式，用来询问动作的对象“谁”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: With ____ did you go to the library? (提示: 谁)
questions.cn: 你和谁一起去了图书馆？

questions.context_sentence: For example, we celebrate William Shakespeare's birthday...
questions.hint: ex (出) + ample (充足的) -> 举出充足的例子来证明。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “例子；范例”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: Every year, my family and I take a photo together under the big tree.
questions.hint: take (拿取) + a + photo (照片) -> 拍一张照片。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Let's ____ a photo together in front of the tree. (提示: 拍照)

questions.context_sentence: under the big tree in our village.
questions.hint: vil (微) + lage (拉客) -> 微小的拉客之地是村庄。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'village' mean in Chinese?

questions.context_sentence: My father marks my height on the door every year.
questions.hint: hei (黑) + ght -> 天黑了也挡不住身高的成长。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'height'?

questions.meaning: adv. & adj. 以后(的)；后来(的)
questions.context_sentence: It's fun to look at the marks later.
questions.hint: late (迟到) + r -> 迟到的人在以后或者后来才来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: See you ____! Have a nice day.

questions.context_sentence: It's so wonderful to watch you grow up.
questions.hint: grow (生长) + up (向上) -> 长大成人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What do you want to be when you ____? (提示: 长大)

questions.context_sentence: Thank you so much for taking care of me and loving me every day.
questions.hint: take care (小心/注意) + of (关于) -> 细心关照照料某人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Thank you for taking care ____ me.

questions.meaning: 使某人抓狂，使某人非常生气
questions.context_sentence: Sometimes you do drive me up the wall with your loud music.
questions.hint: drive (逼迫) + sb + up the wall (上墙) -> 逼人上墙，使人抓狂。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The loud noise is driving me ____ the wall.
questions.cn: 这巨大的噪音真让我抓狂。

questions.context_sentence: How do you make your birthday meaningful?
questions.hint: mean (意思是) + ing + ful (充满的) -> 充满意义的，即有意义的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'meaningful' mean in Chinese?

questions.context_sentence: What birthday gift can Teng Fei give his father?
questions.hint: birthday (生日) + gift (礼物) -> 生日礼物。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “生日礼物”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: Next time, I also want to do something different.
questions.hint: next (下一个) + time (次数/时间) -> 下一次。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I will do better ____. (提示: 下次)

questions.context_sentence: Let's go and buy something for the party this weekend.
questions.hint: some (一些) + thing (事情/东西) -> 某些事情或东西。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Let's buy ____ for the birthday party.
questions.cn: 我们买点过生日派对用的东西吧。

questions.meaning: n. 联系；接触 v. 联系；联络
questions.context_sentence: online forum interface with tabs 'HOME', 'ABOUT', 'POSTS', 'CONTACT'.
questions.hint: con (共同) + tact (触摸) -> 共同触摸，就是联系、接触。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'contact' mean in Chinese?
options: n. 联系；接触 v. 联系；联络

questions.meaning: n. 帖子；邮政 v. 邮寄；发布
questions.context_sentence: Read the posts from an online forum.
questions.hint: 在网络论坛上“寄出”的信息，就是帖子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of the noun 'post' in an online forum?
options: n. 帖子；邮政 v. 邮寄；发布

questions.context_sentence: For example, we celebrate William Shakespeare's birthday...
questions.hint: for (为了) + example (例子) -> 作为例子，即“例如”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “例如”对应的英文短语是？

questions.context_sentence: How old are you?
questions.hint: how (如何) + old (年老的) -> 问年纪多大。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____ are you? - I am twelve.
questions.cn: 你几岁了？- 我十二岁。

questions.context_sentence: How much is this birthday cake?
questions.hint: how (多少) + much (许多) -> 询问价格多少钱。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____ is this birthday cake? - Sixty yuan.
questions.cn: 这个生日蛋糕多少钱？- 六十元。

questions.context_sentence: How many kilos do you want?
questions.hint: how (多少) + many (许多) -> 询问可数物品的数量多少。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____ kilos of yogurt do you want?

questions.context_sentence: I'd like to watch it grow with me.
questions.hint: g + row (排) -> 绿苗排成排成长起来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “成长；长大；增长”对应的英文单词是？

questions.context_sentence: Next, we enjoy the cake, and I open all my gifts.
questions.hint: en (使) + joy (欢乐) -> 使自己欢乐，就是享受乐趣。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We all ____ the delicious chocolate cake.
questions.cn: 我们都很喜欢美味的巧克力蛋糕。

questions.context_sentence: We celebrate our own birthdays.
questions.hint: cel (策) + e + brate (波瑞特) -> 策划庆祝活动。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: How do you usually ____ your birthday?
questions.cn: 你通常怎么庆祝你的生日？
